column1: Here are **30 additional fake blockchain violation records** you can use to make your **GMA Cavite Blockchain Ordinance Prototype look realistic for your thesis demo**. These follow the same structure used in real blockchain logs.
# Optional Display Fields for Your Prototype
For each violation record, your system can display:

Explain that the **TxHash represents the cryptographic proof that the violation record was stored on the blockchain and cannot be altered**, ensuring **transparency and tamper-proof barangay records**.
If you want, I can also generate **another dataset that will make your prototype look like a real government system**, including:
* **Violation heatmap per barangay in GMA Cavite**
* **Blockchain block explorer page (very impressive panel for defense).**
